Notes: Single UPDATE deletes an existing owner name and then adds a new RR at the same owner to probe whether the server evaluates delete_name against the pre-update snapshot or as a barrier for later additions in the same message.

Steps.Description: Delete the helper owner name sweep.campus.edu., then add a new A RR at that same owner in the same UPDATE.

Steps.Name: sweep.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RRset survives the delete_name/add_rr combination.

Steps.Name: sweep.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the owner name exists at all after the UPDATE.
